Package view_controller

package view_controller
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AchievementsPane
    This class represents the achievements pane in the GUI.
    GamePane
    The GamePane class represents the main game interface for the Wordle game.
    InstructionsPane
    This class represents the instructions pane in the GUI of the Wordle game.
    LeaderPane
    This class represents the leader board in the GUI of the Wordle game.
    LoginPane
    This class represents the login pane for the Wordle game.
    StatsPane
    This class represents the statistics pane in the GUI of the Wordle game.
    WordleGUI
    The main GUI class for the Wordle game application.
